narrative:
Monroe Township A (precinct in Clermont County) has 645 registered voters, with 65.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.2 percentage points.
